randy i have finished the first version of the character list
if you and any other humble heads wanna look at it
and see if anyone big and important is missing
working on the bundle: Hell edition
I’ll take a look here soon or tonight
i managed to list 24 unique things that are "humble series characters/motifs"
all of them are in at least 2 games
and serve an important role in at least one of them
oh I read that wrong nvm
i didn't put Spongebob on there because it never serves an important role (NPC, Boss, or major cutscene)
I was thinking of all the npc’s that are across each game and I’m so lost lol
basically the criteria for being on here is being in at least two games, and in at least one of them they either speak, are a boss, or directly influence the game in some way (like the house)
ah ok that makes more sense now
things that are only a boss in one game (see: Sunflower, Eminem) and don't ever reappear aren't on here
and things that are an NPC in only one game (see: Nightmares) also aren't
but things that were a boss that later become an NPC or reoccuring element (see: Rose, Nicki, "her") are on there
you never gave it a more canonical name
it’s cool Alice I just find it funny I know exactly what you are talking about lmao

this rocket transition is so jank
it's an object that while you're touching you're rocket
but because of how rocket works you can tilt yourself such that all of your hitboxes don't exist
therefore you move for a frame and get an hspeed of 3
therefore on the next frame you become rocket again and yeet into the wall
thats literally why I ran it
